jobsplus.job.jobsplus.smith.name: Blacksmith
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.smith.description: The Blacksmith is a master of forging and armor. Use the Blacksmith's powerups to make your armor last longer!
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.hunter.name: Archer
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.hunter.description: The Archer is a master of marksmanship. Use the Archer's powerups to keep your bow in top shape!
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.alchemist.name: Cleric
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.alchemist.descript: The Cleric is a master of potions and brewing. Use the Cleric's powerups to make your potions even stronger!
